title: 日本ダービーの後に・たゆたう雷電

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Unfortunately, the hurdle of the Derby proved
too high after all. Unable to conquer her fear of
racing in a pack, Tamamo Cross loses the race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tamamo Cross's cry rumbles like thunder through
the sky. Her frustration is as clear as day—this
isn't who she envisions White Lightning to be, and
she won't stand for it.
